basics.name: Marcelo Rondon
basics.label: Product Designer
basics.summary: Product designer focused on design systems, technical prototyping, and frontend-aware UX. I prototype the uncertain parts in code before teams commit to build, so product decisions ship with behavior, constraints, and handoff intent already worked out.

work.name: Asheville Dispensary
highlights: Own product design across web, print, and packaging, anchored by a Figma design system that keeps the brand coherent as the product line grows.
Designed and built an internal asset-management tool in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS that gives marketing and operations one place to find, manage, and preserve brand assets.
Design and ship reusable UI components into WordPress through custom PHP and JavaScript plugins, closing the gap between mockups and production.
Partner with marketing and operations to turn ambiguous requests into scoped, shipped product surfaces.

work.name: VegAvengers Marketing
highlights: Designed and built a responsive discovery experience that helps visitors find VegFests and animal sanctuaries through backend-integrated search.
Translated the organization's mission and content structure into maintainable React and TypeScript product surfaces.

work.name: Cello.Design
work.summary: Independent product design and accessibility practice. Selected engagements:
highlights: The Green Phial: redesigned and maintained the WordPress storefront, translating brand direction into responsive, accessible front-end implementation with improved performance and SEO.

Accessibility consulting: improved WCAG 2.1 compliance for multiple organizations, including River Phoenix Center for Peacebuilding, covering screen-reader behavior, keyboard navigation, and performance.
Legal Impact for Chickens: built secure internal tooling for data-management workflows, handling confidential materials with discretion.

work.name: Mantera Advertising Agency
highlights: Designed campaign and marketing materials for retail clients under tight deadlines.
Worked directly with clients through fast iteration cycles, clarifying goals and constraints while protecting quality and delivery dates.

work.name: Success Academy Charter Schools
highlights: Designed remote learning experiences for ELA and math using structured learning frameworks.
Produced educational content and visual aids, applying design thinking to improve comprehension and engagement.

work.name: The Fine Print Magazine
highlights: Led a team of photographers and directed visual coverage for editorial stories and events.
Developed visual direction for fundraising events, using photography and design to improve visibility and engagement.

projects.name: Ghosted
projects.description: Designed and built an AI-assisted workflow product to help technical job seekers manage fragmented applications, documents, interviews, and follow-ups through one local-first product model.
highlights: Full-featured Terminal User Interface with vim-style navigation and keyboard shortcuts
Scriptable CLI interface designed for AI agent integration with JSON I/O
Multi-agent pipeline for automated document generation and job application workflow
Document compilation system converting Typst files to PDFs with smart naming
Job board integration fetching postings from Lever, Greenhouse, Workday, LinkedIn
